VERDICT: FAIL
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The page contains the claim "See our full artist roster below" in the artist-intro paragraph, but this is a forward-looking claim about content that follows it (not content shown "below" in a verifiable comparison sense), and more critically, there are no other claims using the specific language "shown below," "comparable below," or "verifiable below" that would need DOM backing, making this criterion inapplicable or the single interpretable claim insufficiently backed by explicit verification mechanisms.

VERDICT: FAIL

REASON: The primary CTA button "Schedule Your Consultation" is located in the hero section which has 120px top/bottom padding plus header height (~63px), making it likely positioned below the fold on most mobile devices in portrait orientation (typically 667-844px height with ~375px width).

VERDICT: FAIL
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The browser observations show "C6_cta_mobile": "no CTA-like element matched", indicating that the primary CTA button is not visible in the mobile first-screen viewport, likely because it appears below the fold after the large hero section with 120px padding.
